name: Aviators
comment:
Aviators! The best UI Library made specifically for Bloom Built in Elm.

@docs Debounce, button, buttonCfg, callout, calloutCfg, calloutCfg_ok, calloutCfg_error, column, columnCfg, empty, errorText, floatingPage, floatingPageCfg, ghostButton, ghostButtonCfg, img, imgCfg, input, inputCfg, inputCfg_password, inputCfg_text, link, linkCfg, nav, navCfg, outlineButton, outlineButtonCfg, paragraph, paragraphCfg, pickOneFromFew, pickOneFromFewCfg, root, row, rowCfg, solidButton, solidButtonCfg, headline, headlineCfg, subheadline, subheadlineCfg, wrapWithClasses, el

unions.name: Debounce
unions.comment: Used for passing to inputs to indicate that a message should be fired after a debounce interval

values.name: button
values.type: ButtonCfg msg -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: callout
values.type: { a | backgroundColor : String, textColor : String } -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: column
values.type: { b | spacing : Int, classes : List String } -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg

values.name: el
values.type: List (Attribute msg) -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: ghostButton
values.comment:
Intended to just be a transparent button around other things that look like buttons, but aren't (for accessibilty purposes).
For example: logo image
values.type: GhostButtonCfg msg -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: headline
values.type: { a | color : String } -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: img
values.type: { a | alt : String, src : String } -> Html msg

values.name: link
values.type: { a | color : String, target : String } -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: nav
values.type: NavCfg msg -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: navCfg
values.type: { logo : String, logoAltText : String, onClickLogo : Maybe a }

values.name: outlineButton
values.type: OutlineButtonCfg msg -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: paragraph
values.type: { a | color : String } -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: pickOneFromFew
values.type: { b | label : String, labelForOption : a -> String, onChange : Maybe (SelectList a -> msg), options : SelectList a } -> Html msg

values.name: pickOneFromFewCfg
values.type: { label : String, labelForOption : a -> String, onChange : Maybe a1, options : SelectList number, stackWhenSmall : Bool }

values.name: row
values.type: { a | expandChildren : Bool, isolateChildren : Bool, stackWhenSmall : Bool, spacing : number, classes : List String } -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg

values.name: rowCfg
values.type: { isolateChildren : Bool, spacing : number, stackWhenSmall : Bool, expandChildren : Bool, classes : List String }

values.name: solidButton
values.type: { a | color : String, disabled : Bool, disabledColor : String, htmlNode : List (Attribute msg) -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg, maxWidth : String, onClick : Maybe msg, paddingH : Int, paddingV : Int } -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: solidButtonCfg
values.type: { color : String, disabled : Bool, disabledColor : String, htmlNode : List (Attribute msg) -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg, maxWidth : String, onClick : Maybe msg, paddingH : Int, paddingV : Int }

values.name: subheadline
values.type: { a | color : String } -> Html msg -> Html msg

values.name: wrapWithClasses
values.type: List String -> Html msg -> Html msg
